notes: orchestration_events.rs: 'Cannot send lifecycle event with unspecified type' (285/876) and 'Child conversation has no agent identifier' (214) flow only through SendEventResult::Error -> log::warn (telemetry). 'Source conversation not found' (312/695) and 'Source conversation has no server token' (338/726) also flow through SendMessageResult::Error -> UI label 'Failed to send message to {recipients}: {error}' (block/view_impl/orchestration.rs:464), so translate. 'No target agents provided' (791) and 'Unknown agent address' (760) are SendMessageResult::Error -> UI -> translate. file_mcp_watcher.rs: all 8 are safe_warn! args (log::warn) -> telemetry_payload. node_version_popup.rs: 'Application Support' (line 501) is a macOS Library path component identifier -> protocol_key; other 5 are UI text. general_settings.rs: all 6 are settings macro description fields (UI in settings) -> translate. free_tier_limit_hit_modal.rs: all 7 are UI text in modal -> translate. diff_validation/mod.rs: line 14 is a doc comment inside lazy_static! macro -> extractor_false_positive_doc_comment; line 1072 is .expect() panic -> panic_message; lines 178, 199 are fmt::Debug body, 843/914 are fmt::Display body for internal scorer names -> telemetry_payload. repo_metadata/src/local_model.rs: line 41 doc comment inside cfg_if! -> extractor_false_positive_doc_comment; lines 250/991/992/1005/1006 are safe_warn!/log::warn! -> telemetry_payload; 393/515/858 are RepoMetadataError::InvalidPath internal diagnostic strings (no UI sink found) -> telemetry_payload. capture_recorder.rs: lines 304/305 are doc comments inside cfg_if! macro -> extractor_false_positive_doc_comment; rest are log::info/warn/error inside integration test capture path -> telemetry_payload.
